summary: Markets show mixed sentiment on April 25, 2026, with Bitcoin facing resistance around 24,400 but potential upside to 25,000 if broken, while forex pairs and commodities like crude oil exhibit range-bound trading amid selling pressure. Crypto analysis highlights intraday volatility, and prediction markets reflect uncertainty on BTC price. Overall mood is neutral with cautious bullish leans in select assets.
